fTensionPeriod.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonPlot in current decomp; preserved as wiki documentation.] Wiki: Time in seconds between different tension events being spawned (bad). Per the decomp, JsonPlot exposes a different surface for plot tuning.

fReleasePeriod.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonPlot in current decomp.] Wiki: Time in seconds between different release events being spawned (good).

fAutosavePeriod.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonPlot in current decomp.] Wiki: Time in seconds between autosaves.

fSocialPeriod.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonPlot in current decomp.] Wiki: Time in seconds after socialising before characters will socialise with the player again.

dictEventChances.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonPlot in current decomp.] Wiki: Chances for specific plot events to occur. All chances must add up to 1.0.
